questions.question: What empire accounted for 25 percent of the world's population in 1900?

Who needed 34 months to become the first Englishman to circumnavigate the world?
What newly-imported substance caused the first major outbreak of tooth decay in Europe, in the 1500s?
What NBA team is known in China as "The Red Oxen"?
What luxury feature is a car equipped with if it's had its "brains blown out"?
